Journal club — 2026-03-05

Presenter: me
Paper: Segment Anything (Kirillov 2023)

Discussion points:
- Prompt engineering matters. Box prompts beat point prompts on our data.
- The mask decoder is small — most compute is in the image encoder.
- Zero-shot transfer to microscopy was worse than expected; probably
  needs fine-tuning or domain-specific pretraining.
- Somebody asked whether the 1B-mask dataset contains any actual science
  images. Answer: mostly not.
